requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks-
Governance) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks- Governance) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Chairperson' means the Part-time Chairman of the Board of Directors of a bank.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Chairperson' means the Part-time Chairman of the Board of Directors of a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'Clawback' means a contractual agreement between the employee and the
regulated entity in which the employee agrees to return previously paid or vested
remuneration to the entity under certain circumstances.
requirements.object: the employee and the regulated entity in which the employee agrees to return previously paid or vested remuneration to

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'Company' means a company registered under Section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or the corresponding provision under the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: Section 3 of the Companies Act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence: (4) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of a bank.
requirements.object: the Board of a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Independent Director' shall be as defined in Section 149(6) of the Companies
Act, 2013.
requirements.object: Section 149(6) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence: (6) 'Malus' means an arrangement that permits a bank to prevent vesting of all or
requirements.object: a bank to prevent vesting of all or

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'Relative' shall have the meaning assigned to it under clause 77 of Section 2 of
the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: to it under clause 77 of Section 2 of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(8) 'Retention period' means the period of time after the vesting of instruments which
have been awarded as variable pay during which they cannot be sold or
accessed.
requirements.object: after the vesting of instruments which have been awarded as variable pay during which they cannot be sold or accessed

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) 'Substantial interest' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section
5(ne) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
5.
requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 5(ne) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 5

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made
thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of
Terms published by RBI or as used in common or commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Companies Act

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall undertake a process of due diligence at the time of appointment /
re-appointment to determine the suitability of the person for appointment /
continuing to hold appointment as a director on the Board, based upon
qualification, expertise, track record, integrity and other 'fit and proper' criteria.
requirements.object: due diligence at the time of appointment / re-appointment to determine the suitability of the person for appointment / continui

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the bank shall obtain necessary information and 'Declaration &
Undertaking' from the proposed / existing directors in the format enclosed at
requirements.object: 'Declaration & Undertaking' from the proposed / existing directors in the format enclosed at

requirements.full_sentence:
The aforementioned declarations shall be scrutinized by the Nomination and
Remuneration Committee (NRC), constituted in terms of paragraph 22 of these
Directions, which shall, based on the information provided in the signed
declaration, decide on the acceptance and may make references, where
considered necessary to the appropriate authority / persons, to ensure their
compliance with the requirements indicated.
requirements.object: Nomination and Remuneration Committee (NRC), constituted in terms of paragraph 22 of these Directions, which shall, based on the information provided in the signed declaration, decide on the acceptance and may make references

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) while due diligence of directors other than the members of the NRC shall
be carried out by the NRC, due diligence in respect of the members of
the NRC shall be carried out by the Board itself and the members of the
NRC (being interested parties) shall not be involved in this;

(ii) if a member of the NRC has either proposed or seconded the name of a
person for appointment as a director on the bank's Board, such a
member of the NRC shall not be a part of the exercise of conduct of due
diligence in respect of the person proposed to be appointed as a director.
requirements.object: the exercise of conduct of due diligence in respect of the person proposed to be appointed as a director

requirements.full_sentence:
In all such cases, the bank's Board shall nominate another director, as a
temporary member of the NRC, to conduct the exercise of due diligence
in respect of the person proposed to be appointed as a Director on the
bank's Board.
requirements.object: a temporary member of the NRC, to conduct the exercise of due diligence in respect of the person proposed to be appointe

requirements.full_sentence:
Broad 'fit and proper' norms for directors shall include formal qualification,
experience, track record, integrity etc.
requirements.object: track record, integrity etc

requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, a bank shall adhere to the
following criteria to determine the 'fit and proper' status of the proposed
candidates for independent / Non-Executive Directors (NEDs):
<image>
requirements.object: criteria to determine the 'fit and proper' status of the proposed candidates for independent / Non-Executive Directors (NEDs):

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Age: The upper age limit for NEDs, including the Chair of the Board, shall
be 70 years and after attaining the age of 70 years no person can
continue in these positions.
requirements.object: after attaining the age of 70 years no person can continue in these positions

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Experience and field of expertise - In accordance with Section 10A(2)(a)
of the Banking Regulation Act, not less than 51 per cent of the total
number of members of the Board of Directors of a banking company shall
consist of persons who shall have special knowledge or practical
experience in respect of one or more of the following areas, namely:
requirements.object: shall have special knowledge or practical experience in respect of one or more of the following areas, namely:

conditions: Provided that out of the aforesaid number of directors
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that out of the aforesaid number of directors, not less than two
shall be persons having special knowledge or practical experience in
respect of agriculture and rural economy, cooperation or small scale
industry.
requirements.object: knowledge or practical experience in respect of agriculture and rural economy, cooperation or small scale industry

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Substantial interest and other restrictions - In accordance with Section
10A(2)(b) of the Banking Regulation Act, not less than 51 per cent of the
total number of members of the Board of Directors of a banking company
shall consist of persons, who shall not:

(iv) As a matter of desirable practice, not more than one member of a family
or a close relative or an associate (partner, employee, director, etc.) may
be on the Board of a bank.
requirements.object: of a bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Tenure - The total tenure of an NED, continuously or otherwise, on the
Board of a bank, shall not exceed eight years.

After completing eight
years on the Board of a bank the person may be considered for re-
appointment only after a minimum gap of two years.
requirements.object: appointment only after a minimum gap of two years

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the minimum gap of two years to be observed before
reappointment be reduced to 6 months in respect of the following
directors:
requirements.object: of two years to be observed before reappointment be reduced to 6 months in respect of the following directors:

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall obtain from a director:

conditions: where there is change in the information provided earlier
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, where there is change in the information provided earlier,
the bank shall obtain requisite details from the director/s forthwith.
requirements.object: the director/s forthwith

requirements.full_sentence:
An annual certificate of the bank having undertaken such continuing due
diligence shall be submitted to RBI.

A bank shall have a Part-time Chairman of the Board of Directors and a separate
Managing Director / Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer (MD&CEO)
who shall be responsible for day-to-day management of the bank.
requirements.object: of the Board of Directors and a separate Managing Director / Managing Director & Chief Executive Officer (MD&CEO) who shall

requirements.full_sentence:
No person shall continue as the MD&CEO or WTD of a bank beyond the age of
70 years.
requirements.object: or WTD of a bank beyond the age of 70 years

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall conduct its affairs in such ways that it remains wholly solvent,
adequately liquid and reasonably profitable.
requirements.object: such ways that it remains wholly solvent, adequately liquid and reasonably profitable

requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, it shall ensure that its
Memorandum and the Articles of Association are in conformity with extant
statutory and regulatory instructions.
requirements.object: and the Articles of Association are in conformity with extant statutory and regulatory instructions

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall institutionalise discussions between its management and the Board
on quality of internal control systems.
requirements.object: management and the Board on quality of internal control systems

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall specifically pay attention
to creating and sustaining a culture of control.
requirements.object: creating and sustaining a culture of control

requirements.full_sentence:
The non-executive directors (NEDs) of a bank shall address themselves to policy
formulations, performance appraisal and proper arrangements for
implementation of decisions of the Board and its Committees leaving the
operational aspects to the care of MD&CEO and other executives.
requirements.object: formulations, performance appraisal and proper arrangements for implementation of decisions of the Board and its Committe

requirements.full_sentence:
Some of the
important areas on which the NEDs shall bestow particular attention are
compliance with monetary and credit policy of RBI / Government, observance of
Cash Reserve and Statutory Liquidity Ratio, efficient management of funds and
profitability, overall sectional deployment of funds, performance budgeting,
housekeeping particularly reconciliation of inter-office accounts, customer
service, vigilance, avoidance of frauds and development of a good system of
management information and monitoring.
requirements.object: compliance with monetary and credit policy of RBI / Government, observance of Cash Reserve and Statutory Liquidity Rat

requirements.full_sentence:
A NED of a bank shall not only take interest in the bank's work concerning their
own fields of specialisation / activity but also deliberate on all matters of general
policy affecting the bank's functioning including those concerning the staff.
requirements.object: the bank's work concerning their own fields of specialisation / activity but also deliberate on all matters of general policy af

requirements.full_sentence:
In the context of what has been stated hereinbefore, a NED, in the discharge of
their duties, shall observe the following:

(ii) a NED as an individual, shall have no power to act on behalf of the bank
nor can they give any direction to the employees of the bank on behalf
of the management.
requirements.object: act on behalf of the bank nor can they give any direction to the employees of the bank on behalf of the management

requirements.full_sentence:
A NED shall desist from sending any instructions to
the individual officers on any matters and such cases, if any, shall be
routed through the MD&CEO of the bank.
requirements.object: instructions to the individual officers on any matters and such cases

conditions:
if any information is
required for the purpose of taking a decision or reviewing the situation at
the Board level
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if any information is
required for the purpose of taking a decision or reviewing the situation at
the Board level, it shall be sought from the management.
requirements.object: management

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) unless specifically authorised by a Board resolution, a NED shall
exercise power only as a member of a collective body, sitting along with
others on the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: a member of a collective body, sitting along with others on the Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence:
An individual director or a Committee
of the Board may be authorised by the Board to finally decide any matter
or make recommendations thereon to the Board.
requirements.object: Board to finally decide any matter or make recommendations thereon to the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) a NED shall act with the amount of care and prudence which an ordinary
person is expected to take in their own business.
requirements.object: of care and prudence which an ordinary person is expected to take in their own business

conditions: when any such contract
requirements.full_sentence:
(v) a NED who is directly or indirectly concerned or interested in any
contract, loan, arrangement or proposal entered into or proposed to be
entered by or on behalf of the banking company shall, as soon as
possible after the relevant circumstances have come to their knowledge,
disclose the nature of their interest to the Board when any such contract,
loan, arrangement or proposal is discussed.
requirements.object: possible after the relevant circumstances have come to their knowledge, disclose the nature of their interest to the Board when any such

requirements.full_sentence:
Unless their presence is
required by the other directors for the purpose of eliciting information, no
NED, so required to be present, shall vote on any such contract, loan,
arrangement or proposal.
requirements.object: contract, loan, arrangement or proposal

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) a NED shall not sponsor any individual proposal, nor shall they approach
directly the Branch Managers to sanction loans or other facilities to any
constituent.
requirements.object: nor shall they approach directly the Branch Managers to sanction loans or other facilities to any constituent

requirements.full_sentence: shall be the job of the technical experts i.e.
requirements.object: the technical experts i

requirements.full_sentence:
the
bank executives, in examining individual credit proposals, a NED shall
carefully analyse the state of health of the concerned units by observing
the cash flow position and appropriate action taken to ensure that the
position of the unit does not deteriorate and the funds get locked up.
requirements.object: of health of the concerned units by observing the cash flow position and appropriate action taken to ensure that the posit

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) a NED shall not sponsor individual cases of employees or officers
regarding their recruitment, transfers, promotions, postings and other
related matters.
requirements.object: employees or officers regarding their recruitment, transfers, promotions, postings and other related matters

conditions:
If they have any specific complaint against an individual
employee
requirements.full_sentence:
If they have any specific complaint against an individual
employee, they shall be taken up and brought to the notice of the
MD&CEO and not any officer below them.
requirements.object: brought to the notice of the MD&CEO and not any officer below them

requirements.full_sentence:
shall observe, except as otherwise
required by law, the practices and usages customary among bankers,
and in particular, not divulge any information relating to or to the affairs
of its constituents except in circumstances in which it is, in accordance
with law or practices and usages customary among bankers, necessary
or appropriate for the banking company to divulge such information.

A NED on the Board of a bank shall perform their role in such a manner as to
assist the Chairman and strengthen the management to bring about qualitative
and quantitative improvement in the working of the bank.
requirements.object: such a manner as to assist the Chairman and strengthen the management to bring about qualitative and quantitative improvement in

requirements.full_sentence:
In this connection, the
NEDs shall ensure adherence to the following illustrative, but not exhaustive, list
of DO'S and DONT'S:
requirements.object: following illustrative, but not exhaustive, list of DO'S and DONT'S:

requirements.full_sentence:
The management on its part shall furnish full
facts and complete papers in advance;
requirements.object: complete papers in advance

requirements.full_sentence:
They
shall disclose their interest well in advance to the MD&CEO;
requirements.object: in advance to the MD&CEO

requirements.full_sentence:
All information / clarification that they may require for
taking a decision shall be made available by the management.
requirements.object: the management

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure
confidentiality of the bank's agenda papers / notes, it is suggested
that by way of abundant precaution, the Board papers may be
returned to the bank after the meeting;
requirements.object: bank after the meeting

requirements.full_sentence:
They may indicate their directorship of the bank
on their visiting card or letter heads.
requirements.object: the bank on their visiting card or letter heads

requirements.full_sentence:
MD&CEO / WTDs shall exercise such powers and discharge such duties as may
be delegated to them by the Board.
requirements.object: discharge such duties as may be delegated to them by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall determine the Board agenda items and the periodicity thereof, with
the approval of their Boards, such that there is adequate focus on matters of
strategic and financial importance, including the seven broad themes indicated
below:
Category Description
Development of new products Competitiveness of individual businesses Business reviews in relation to targets.
requirements.object: items and the periodicity thereof, with the approval of their Boards, such that there is adequate focus on matters of strat

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall place before its Board, copies of all directives/circulars and other
important communications from RBI and the Government along with adequate
<image>
background and supplementary information of the policies and instructions
sought to be conveyed in the said circulars.
requirements.object: copies of all directives/circulars and other important communications from RBI and the Government along with adequate <image>

requirements.full_sentence:
The board of directors of bank shall constitute a 'Nomination and Remuneration
Committee' (NRC) of the board comprising three or more non-executive
directors, out of which not less than one-half shall be independent directors and
shall include at least one member from Risk Management Committee of the
board (RMCB).
requirements.object: Remuneration Committee' (NRC) of the board comprising three or more non-executive directors, out of which not less than o

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall refer to Circulars DoS.No.5/16.13.100/94 dated April 09, 1994;

A bank may pay its NEDs remuneration in the form of:
Explanation: The Board of a bank may fix a lower amount within the
ceiling limit of ₹30 lakh per annum depending upon the size of the bank,
experience of the NED and other relevant factors.
requirements.object: in the form of: Explanation: The Board of a bank may fix a lower amount within the ceiling limit of ₹30 lakh per annum depen

requirements.full_sentence:
expenses related to
attending meetings of the Board and its committees which shall be fixed
with the approval of the Board subject to compliance with the extant
statutory provisions.
requirements.object: approval of the Board subject to compliance with the extant statutory provisions

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the bank shall set suitable
criteria, such that the fixed remuneration is commensurate with an
individual director's responsibilities and demands on time and are
considered sufficient to attract qualified competent individuals.
requirements.object: that the fixed remuneration is commensurate with an individual director's responsibilities and demands on time and are con

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's compensation policies and practices in respect of WTDs, MD&CEO,
Material Risk Takers (MRTs), and Control Function staff shall be in accordance
with the Guidelines set out in paragraph 26, and the Basel Committee on Banking
Supervision (BCBS) Methodologies detailed in paragraph 27 of these Directions.
requirements.object: the Guidelines set out in paragraph 26, and the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BCBS) Methodologies detailed in paragrap

requirements.full_sentence:
Guidelines: a bank shall implement necessary policies or systems to ensure
adherence to the guidelines delineated below which are based on the FSB
Principles for Sound Compensation Practices and their Implementation
Standards, as well as current statutory and regulatory framework in India.
requirements.object: systems to ensure adherence to the guidelines delineated below which are based on the FSB Principles for Sound Compens

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Guideline 1: Compensation Policy
A bank shall formulate and adopt a comprehensive compensation policy covering
all its employees and conduct annual review thereof.
requirements.object: comprehensive compensation policy covering all its employees and conduct annual review thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall cover all
aspects of the compensation structure such as fixed pay, perquisites,
performance bonus, guaranteed bonus (joining / sign-on bonus), severance
<image>
package, share-linked instruments e.g.
requirements.object: the compensation structure such as fixed pay, perquisites, performance bonus, guaranteed bonus (joining / sign-on bonus), severan

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Guideline 2: NRC
The NRC of the Board of a bank shall oversee the framing, review and
implementation of compensation policy of the bank on behalf of the Board.
requirements.object: and implementation of compensation policy of the bank on behalf of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
The
NRC shall work in close coordination with RMCB, to achieve effective alignment
between compensation and risks.
requirements.object: with RMCB, to achieve effective alignment between compensation and risks

requirements.full_sentence:
The NRC shall also ensure that the
cost/income ratio of the bank supports the compensation package consistent
with maintenance of sound capital adequacy ratio.
requirements.object: cost/income ratio of the bank supports the compensation package consistent with maintenance of sound capital adequacy ratio

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Guideline 3: For WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs
A bank shall ensure that for the WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs:
Explanation: 'No faster than pro rata basis' means vesting shall
not be frontloaded.
requirements.object: WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs: Explanation: 'No faster than pro rata basis' means vesting shall not be frontloaded

conditions:
if the deferral arrangement is
three years
requirements.full_sentence:
In other words, if the deferral arrangement is
three years, not more than 33.33 per cent of the total granted
ESOPs should vest at the end of first year.
requirements.object: of first year

requirements.full_sentence:
A wide variety of measures of credit, market, liquidity and various other risks shall
be used by a bank in implementation of risk adjustment.
requirements.object: bank in implementation of risk adjustment

requirements.full_sentence:
The risk adjustment
methods may preferably have both quantitative and judgmental elements.
requirements.object: and judgmental elements

requirements.full_sentence:
The
compensation shall also be in compliance with all statutory requirements.
requirements.object: with all statutory requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
The compensation structure for the WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs of a bank shall be
as under:

(i) Fixed Pay and Perquisites: A bank shall ensure that the fixed portion of
compensation is reasonable, taking into account all relevant factors
including adherence to statutory requirements and industry practice.
requirements.object: portion of compensation is reasonable, taking into account all relevant factors including adherence to statutory requirements an

requirements.full_sentence:
All
the fixed items of compensation, including the perquisites, shall be
treated as part of fixed pay.
requirements.object: of fixed pay

requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that all perquisites that are
reimbursable shall also be included in the fixed pay so long as there are
monetary ceilings on these reimbursements.
requirements.object: the fixed pay so long as there are monetary ceilings on these reimbursements

requirements.full_sentence:
Contributions towards
superannuation / retiral benefits shall be treated as part of fixed pay.
requirements.object: of fixed pay

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Composition of Variable Pay: The variable pay may be in the form
of share-linked instruments [including Cash-linked Stock
Appreciation Rights (CSARs)], or a mix of cash and share-linked
instruments.
requirements.object: of share-linked instruments [including Cash-linked Stock Appreciation Rights (CSARs)], or a mix of cash and share-linked instruments

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be proper balance between the cash and
share-linked components in the variable pay.
requirements.object: the cash and share-linked components in the variable pay

requirements.full_sentence:
Only in cases where
the compensation by way of share-linked instruments is not
permitted by law / regulations, the entire variable pay may be in
cash.

(b) Limit on Variable Pay: It shall be ensured that there is a proper
balance between fixed pay and variable pay.
requirements.object: is a proper balance between fixed pay and variable pay

requirements.full_sentence:
In this respect, the
bank shall ensure that:
i.

In accordance with FSB Implementation Standards, read with
sub-point (iv) of this subparagraph and BCBS stipulation
furnished in paragraph 27(i), a substantial proportion of
compensation i.e., at least 50 per cent, shall be variable and
paid on the basis of individual, business-unit and firm-wide
measures that adequately measure performance, except in
cases mentioned in sub-point (ii) of this subparagraph and
guideline (4).
requirements.object: on the basis of individual, business-unit and firm-wide measures that adequately measure performance

requirements.full_sentence:
At higher levels of responsibility, the proportion
of variable pay shall be higher.

The total variable pay shall be
limited to a maximum of 300 per cent of the fixed pay (for the
relative performance measurement period).
requirements.object: maximum of 300 per cent of the fixed pay (for the relative performance measurement period)

requirements.full_sentence:
and in case
variable pay is above 200 per cent, a minimum of 67 per cent
of the variable pay shall be via non-cash instruments.

In the event that an executive is barred by statute or regulation
from grant of share-linked instruments, their variable pay shall
be capped at 150 per cent of the fixed pay, but shall not be
less than 50 per cent of the fixed pay.
requirements.object: per cent of the fixed pay

requirements.full_sentence:
The deterioration in the financial performance of the bank shall
generally lead to a contraction in the total amount of variable
compensation, which may even be reduced to zero.
requirements.object: contraction in the total amount of variable compensation, which may even be reduced to zero

requirements.full_sentence:
For senior executives, including WTDs, and other employees
who are MRTs (see guideline (6) below), in adherence to FSB
Implementation Standards, deferral arrangements shall
invariably exist for the variable pay, regardless of the quantum
of pay.
requirements.object: variable pay, regardless of the quantum of pay

requirements.full_sentence:
For such executives of a bank, a minimum of 60 per
cent of the total variable pay shall be under deferral
arrangements.

conditions:
if cash component is part of variable
pay
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if cash component is part of variable
pay, at least 50 per cent of the cash bonus shall also be
deferred.

conditions:
where the cash component of variable pay
is under ₹25 lakh
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in cases where the cash component of variable pay
is under ₹25 lakh, deferral requirements may not be
necessary.

(d) Period of Deferral Arrangement: The deferral period shall be a
minimum of three years.
requirements.object: three years

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be applicable to both the cash
and non-cash components of the variable pay.
requirements.object: the cash and non-cash components of the variable pay

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) Vesting: Deferred remuneration shall either vest fully at the end
of the deferral period or be spread out over the course of the
deferral period.
requirements.object: the end of the deferral period or be spread out over the course of the deferral period

requirements.full_sentence:
The first such vesting shall not be before one year
from the commencement of the deferral period.
requirements.object: from the commencement of the deferral period

requirements.full_sentence:
The vesting shall
be no faster than pro rata arrived on a cumulative basis.
requirements.object: pro rata arrived on a cumulative basis

requirements.full_sentence:
Additionally, vesting shall not take place more frequently than on
a yearly basis to ensure a proper assessment of risks before the
application of ex post adjustments.
requirements.object: than on a yearly basis to ensure a proper assessment of risks before the application of ex post adjustments

requirements.full_sentence:
66.67 per cent of total granted ESOPs should vest at the end of
second year.
requirements.object: of second year

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) Share-linked Instruments: Such instruments shall be included as
a component of variable pay.
requirements.object: component of variable pay

requirements.full_sentence:
Norms for grant of share-linked
instruments shall be framed by a bank in conformity with relevant
statutory provisions and should form part of the bank's
compensation policy.
requirements.object: bank in conformity with relevant statutory provisions and should form part of the bank's compensation policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The details of share-linked instruments
granted shall also be disclosed in terms of the disclosure
requirements stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area
Banks: Financial Statements - Presentation and Disclosures)
Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: terms of the disclosure requirements stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks: Financial Statements - Presentati

requirements.full_sentence:
Share-linked instruments shall be fair valued on
the date of grant by the bank using Black-Scholes model.
requirements.object: the date of grant by the bank using Black-Scholes model

requirements.full_sentence:
The fair
value thus arrived at shall be recognised as an expense
beginning with the accounting period for which approval has been
granted.
requirements.object: expense beginning with the accounting period for which approval has been granted

requirements.full_sentence:
The deferred compensation shall be subject to malus /
clawback arrangements in the event of subdued or negative
financial performance of the bank and / or the relevant line of
business in any year.
requirements.object: / clawback arrangements in the event of subdued or negative financial performance of the bank and / or the relevant line of busine

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall put in place appropriate modalities to incorporate
malus / clawback mechanism in respect of variable pay, taking
into account Supplementary Guidance issued by FSB in
March 2018 on use of compensation tools to address
misconduct risk, and all relevant statutory and regulatory
stipulations, as applicable.
requirements.object: modalities to incorporate malus / clawback mechanism in respect of variable pay, taking into account Supplementary Guidance i

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall identify a
representative set of situations in their Compensation Policies,
which require it to invoke the malus and clawback clauses that
may be applicable on entire variable pay.
requirements.object: of situations in their Compensation Policies, which require it to invoke the malus and clawback clauses that may be appl

conditions:
When setting criteria
for the application of malus and clawback
requirements.full_sentence:
When setting criteria
for the application of malus and clawback, a bank shall also
specify a period during which malus and / or clawback can be
applied, covering at least deferral and retention periods.
requirements.object: during which malus and / or clawback can be applied, covering at least deferral and retention periods

requirements.full_sentence:
Wherever the assessed divergence in bank's provisioning for
Non-Performing Assets (NPAs) or asset classification exceeds
the prescribed threshold for public disclosure in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks: Financial
Statements - Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025,
a bank shall not pay the unvested portion of the variable
compensation for the assessment year under 'malus' clause.
requirements.object: of the variable compensation for the assessment year under 'malus' clause

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in such situations, no proposal for increase in variable
pay (for the assessment year) shall be entertained.

conditions:
In case the
bank's post assessment Gross NPAs are less than 2.0 per
cent
requirements.full_sentence:
In case the
bank's post assessment Gross NPAs are less than 2.0 per
cent, these restrictions shall apply only if criteria for public
disclosure are triggered either on account of divergence in
provisioning or both provisioning and asset classification.
requirements.object: for public disclosure are triggered either on account of divergence in provisioning or both provisioning and asset classificati

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) Guaranteed Bonus: Guaranteed bonus is not consistent with
sound risk management or the 'pay for performance' principles
and shall not be part of the compensation plan.
requirements.object: compensation plan

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore,
guaranteed bonus shall only occur in the context of hiring new
staff as joining / sign-on bonus and be limited to the first year.
requirements.object: context of hiring new staff as joining / sign-on bonus and be limited to the first year

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, joining / sign-on bonus shall be in the form of share-
linked instruments only, since upfront payments in cash would
create perverse incentives.
requirements.object: of share- linked instruments only, since upfront payments in cash would create perverse incentives

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a
bank shall not grant severance pay other than accrued benefits
(gratuity, pension, etc.) except in cases where it is mandatory
under any statute.
requirements.object: than accrued benefits (gratuity, pension, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Hedging: A bank shall not permit employees to insure or hedge
their compensation structure to offset the risk alignment effects
embedded in their compensation arrangement.
requirements.object: or hedge their compensation structure to offset the risk alignment effects embedded in their compensation arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
To enforce the
same, a bank shall establish appropriate compliance
arrangements.

<image>
(4) Guideline 4: For risk control and compliance staff
Members of staff engaged in financial and risk control, including internal audit,
shall be compensated in a manner that is independent of the business areas they
oversee and commensurate with their key role in the bank.
requirements.object: manner that is independent of the business areas they oversee and commensurate with their key role in the bank

conditions:
If their own compensation is
significantly affected by short-term measures
requirements.full_sentence:
If their own compensation is
significantly affected by short-term measures, their independence may be
compromised.

conditions: If their compensation is too low
requirements.full_sentence:
If their compensation is too low, the quality of such employees
may be insufficient for their tasks and their authority may be undermined.
requirements.object: tasks and their authority may be undermined

requirements.full_sentence:
The
mix of fixed and variable compensation for control function personnel shall be
weighted in favour of fixed compensation.
requirements.object: of fixed compensation

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the requirement of
minimum 50 per cent of total compensation to be paid in the form of variable pay
shall not be applicable for this category of staff.
requirements.object: category of staff

conditions: when warranted
requirements.full_sentence:
However, a reasonable
proportion of compensation shall be in the form of variable pay, so that exercising
the options of malus and / or clawback, when warranted, is not rendered
infructuous.
requirements.object: of variable pay, so that exercising the options of malus and / or clawback

requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to the above, while devising compensation structure for such
staff, a bank shall adopt principles similar to principles enunciated for WTDs /
MD&CEO, as appropriate.
requirements.object: principles enunciated for WTDs / MD&CEO, as appropriate

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Guideline 5: For other categories of staff
While these Guidelines do not apply to bank's staff other than WTDs / MD&CEO
/ MRTs and Control Function Staff, a bank may adopt similar principles, with
suitable modifications, as appropriate for them as well.
requirements.object: suitable modifications, as appropriate for them as well

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Guideline 6: Identification of MRTs of the bank
A bank shall identify its MRTs whose actions have a material impact on the risk
exposure of the bank, and who satisfy the qualitative and any one of the
quantitative criteria given below:
requirements.object: actions have a material impact on the risk exposure of the bank, and who satisfy the qualitative and any one of the quantitati

requirements.full_sentence:
the
determination of which may be done prudently by the bank, or
requirements.object: the bank, or

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall refer to the BCBS report titled 'Range of Methodologies for Risk and
Performance Alignment of Remuneration' published in May 2011 to enhance its
understanding of risk-adjusted remuneration.
requirements.object: report titled 'Range of Methodologies for Risk and Performance Alignment of Remuneration' published in May 2011 to enhance its under

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Guideline 7: Disclosure
A bank shall make disclosure on remuneration of WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs on
an annual basis at the minimum, in their Annual Financial Statements as
prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks: Financial Statements -
Presentation, Disclosures and Reporting) Directions, 2025, as amended from
time to time.
requirements.object: of WTDs / MD&CEO / MRTs on an annual basis at the minimum, in their Annual Financial Statements as prescribed in Reser
employment of any person whose remuneration is, in the opinion of RBI, excessive

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) a bank operating in India is required to obtain regulatory approval for
grant of remuneration to WTDs / MD&CEO in terms of Section 35B of
the B.R.
requirements.object: for grant of remuneration to WTDs / MD&CEO in terms of Section 35B of the B

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) a bank's compensation policy shall also be subject to supervisory
oversight including review under Basel framework.
requirements.object: supervisory oversight including review under Basel framework

requirements.full_sentence:
Deficiencies
observed in this regard shall have the effect of increasing the risk profile
of the bank with attendant consequences, including a requirement of
additional capital if the deficiencies are very significant.
requirements.object: increasing the risk profile of the bank with attendant consequences, including a requirement of additional capital if the deficienc

requirements.full_sentence:
BCBS Methodologies for risk and performance alignment of remuneration:
The BCBS in consultation with the FSB had published a report in May 2011 titled
'Range of Methodologies for Risk and Performance Alignment of Remuneration'.
requirements.object: Methodologies for Risk and Performance Alignment of Remuneration'

conditions: when developing their methodologies as well as by supervisors
requirements.full_sentence:
and (b) the elements
influencing the effectiveness of risk alignment that should be considered by
banks when developing their methodologies as well as by supervisors, when
reviewing and assessing banks' practices;
requirements.object: when developing their methodologies as well as by supervisors

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) A bank shall ensure that the variable part of remuneration is truly and
effectively variable and may even be reduced to zero, in line with the
symmetry principle defined by the FSB.
requirements.object: part of remuneration is truly and effectively variable and may even be reduced to zero, in line with the symmetry principle d

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall be able to
demonstrate to supervisors that the methodologies used to adjust
variable remuneration to risk and performance are appropriate to its
specific circumstances;
requirements.object: to supervisors that the methodologies used to adjust variable remuneration to risk and performance are appropriate to its speci

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The methodologies adopted by a bank for aligning remuneration with risk
and performance shall be consistent with its general risk management
and corporate governance framework.
requirements.object: general risk management and corporate governance framework

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Performance measures and their relation to remuneration packages
shall be clearly defined at the beginning of the performance
measurement period to ensure that the employees of a bank perceive
the incentive mechanism.
requirements.object: the beginning of the performance measurement period to ensure that the employees of a bank perceive the incentive mechanism

requirements.full_sentence:
The usual annual determination of bonus shall
be based on rules, processes and objectives known in advance,
although some degree of discretion may be retained.
requirements.object: processes and objectives known in advance, although some degree of discretion may be retained

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) A bank shall use a combination of financial and non-financial measures
to assess employee performance and adapt the measurement to each
employee's specific situation.
requirements.object: financial and non-financial measures to assess employee performance and adapt the measurement to each employee's specific situati

requirements.full_sentence:
Qualitative factors viz., knowledge, skills
and abilities may be considered, particularly where these serve to
reinforce the bank's risk management goals.
requirements.object: these serve to reinforce the bank's risk management goals

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The nature and extent to which risk adjustments are needed in
remuneration shall depend on the extent to which performance
measures capture risks.
requirements.object: to which performance measures capture risks

requirements.full_sentence:
In all cases, risk adjustment shall be made,
given that remuneration is often awarded before the final outcome of an
<image>
activity is known.
requirements.object: remuneration is often awarded before the final outcome of an <image> activity is known

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall estimate risks ex ante and monitor
outcomes ex post, with both influencing the final payouts.
requirements.object: and monitor outcomes ex post, with both influencing the final payouts

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) Risk adjustments shall take into account the nature of the risks involved
and the time horizons over which they may emerge.
requirements.object: nature of the risks involved and the time horizons over which they may emerge

requirements.full_sentence:
The impact of
remuneration adjustments shall be linked to actions taken by employees
and / or business units, and their impact on the level of risk taken on by
the bank.
requirements.object: taken by employees and / or business units, and their impact on the level of risk taken on by the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) A bank shall carefully consider the nature of the award process, which
links the variable remuneration of each individual employee with bonus
pools and the total amount of variable remuneration at a bank's level, as
it directly influences how and when performance and risk adjustment are
or may be used.
requirements.object: of the award process, which links the variable remuneration of each individual employee with bonus pools and the total a

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall seek prior approval of RBI for the following purposes by submitting
corresponding information and documents through the Pravaah Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in):
requirements.object: RBI for the following purposes by submitting corresponding information and documents through the Pravaah Portal (https://pravaa

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) A proposal for appointment of a new MD&CEO shall invariably
contain a panel of at least two names in the order of preference
and shall be submitted to RBI at least four months before the
expiry of the term of office of the present incumbent.
requirements.object: of at least two names in the order of preference and shall be submitted to RBI at least four months before the expiry of th

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) A proposal for re-appointment of MD&CEO shall be submitted to
RBI at least six months before the expiry of the term of office of
the incumbent.
requirements.object: at least six months before the expiry of the term of office of the incumbent

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall seek regulatory approval for grant of remuneration (i.e.
requirements.object: grant of remuneration (i

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, a bank shall submit application through
the Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) in the format prescribed in Annex
V.
requirements.object: Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah

conditions: Provided that the approval process shall involve
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the approval process shall involve, inter alia, an assessment of
whether the bank's compensation policies and practices are in accordance with
the Guidelines and the BCBS Methodologies set out or detailed in paragraph 26
and paragraph 27 respectively of these Directions.
requirements.object: assessment of whether the bank's compensation policies and practices are in accordance with the Guidelines and the BCBS Method

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall obtain regulatory approval regarding remuneration to Part-time
Chairman in terms of Section 10B(1A)(i) and 35B of the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 through the Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
requirements.object: remuneration to Part-time Chairman in terms of Section 10B(1A)(i) and 35B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 thr

conditions:
when they take
place to the Department of Regulation
requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in the Board composition shall be reported as and when they take
place to the Department of Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India in
the format given at Annex VI.
requirements.object: when they take place to the Department of Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India in the format given at Annex VI

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall obtain regulatory approval regarding Additional Roles or
Responsibilities of MD&CEO in terms of Section 10B(8) of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949, through the Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
requirements.object: Additional Roles or Responsibilities of MD&CEO in terms of Section 10B(8) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, th

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank proposing to amend its Articles of Association shall obtain prior regulatory
approval for such amendment in terms of Section 35B of the Banking Regulation
Act, 1949 through the Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) before
circulating the draft amendments to its shareholders or convening a meeting of
the shareholders in this regard.
requirements.object: for such amendment in terms of Section 35B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 through the Pravaah Portal (https://pr

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior
to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal of these directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
requirements.object: affect:

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

List of entities, existing and proposed, in which holding substantial interest within the meaning of Section 5(ne)1 of the
1 'substantial interest' (i) in relation to a company, means the holding of a beneficial interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together, in the shares thereof, the amount paid up on which exceeds two crore rupees or such other amount as may be notified in the Official Gazette by the Central Government or ten per cent of the paid-up capital of the company, whichever is less;
requirements.object: Official Gazette by the Central Government or ten per cent of the paid-up capital of the company, whichever is less

requirements.full_sentence: (ii) in relation to a firm, means the beneficial interest held therein by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together, which represents more than ten per cent of the total capital subscribed by all the partners of the said firm.
requirements.object: therein by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together, which represents more than ten p

conditions: in case the reversal/ setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction
requirements.full_sentence: (Though it shall not be necessary for a candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings which have been later on reversed/ set aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the same, in case the reversal/ setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction, and not on merit.
requirements.object: candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings which have been later on reversed/ set aside in toto, it would be nece

conditions: If the order is temporarily stayed and the appellate/ court proceedings are pending
requirements.full_sentence: If the order is temporarily stayed and the appellate/ court proceedings are pending, the same also should be mentioned).
In the interest of disclosure and transparency, should there be any other information relevant for assessing 'fit and proper', provide details thereof.
requirements.object: information relevant for assessing 'fit and proper', provide details thereof

conditions:
in case of any
other contract or arrangement
requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The director shall disclose to the Board the nature of his/her interest, direct
or indirect, if he/she has any interest in or is concerned with a contract or
arrangement or any proposed contract or arrangement entered into or to be
entered into between the Bank and any other person, immediately upon
becoming aware of the same or at meeting of the Board at which the question
of entering into such contract or arrangement is taken into consideration or if
the director was not at the date of that meeting concerned or interested in
such proposed contract or arrangement, then at the first meeting of the Board
held after he/she becomes so concerned or interested and in case of any
other contract or arrangement, the required disclosure shall be made at the
first meeting of the Board held after the director becomes concerned or
interested in the contract or arrangement.
requirements.object: the nature of his/her interest, direct or indirect

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The director shall disclose by general notice to the Board his/her other
directorships, his/her memberships of bodies corporate, his/her interest in
other entities and his/her interest as a partner or proprietor of firms and shall
keep the Board apprised of all changes therein.
requirements.object: to the Board his/her other directorships, his/her memberships of bodies corporate, his/her interest in other entities and h

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The director shall provide to the Bank a list of his/her relatives to the extent
the director is aware directorships and interests of such relatives in other
bodies corporate, firms and other entities.
requirements.object: a list of his/her relatives to the extent the director is aware directorships and interests of such relatives in other bodies corp

requirements.full_sentence: (iv) The director shall in carrying on his/her duties as director of the Bank:
requirements.object: duties as director of the Bank:

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) use such degree of skill as may be reasonable to expect from a
person with his/her knowledge or experience;
requirements.object: from a person with his/her knowledge or experience

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) shall keep himself/herself informed about the business, activities
and financial status of the Bank to the extent disclosed to him/her;
requirements.object: the business, activities and financial status of the Bank to the extent disclosed to him/her

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) shall not seek to influence any decision of the Board for any
consideration other than in the interests of the Bank;
requirements.object: decision of the Board for any consideration other than in the interests of the Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) shall bring independent judgement to bear on all matters affecting
the Bank brought before the Board including but not limited to statutory compliances, performance reviews, compliances with internal control systems and procedures, key executive appointments and standards of conduct;
requirements.object: bear on all matters affecting the Bank brought before the Board including but not limited to statutory compliances, per

requirements.full_sentence:
(g) shall in exercise of his/her judgement in matters brought before the
Board or entrusted to him/her by the Board be free from any business or other relationship which could materially interfere with the exercise of his/her independent judgement;
requirements.object: judgement in matters brought before the Board or entrusted to him/her by the Board be free from any business or other relations

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) shall express his/her views and opinions at Board meetings without
any fear or favour and without any influence on exercise of his/her independent judgement;
requirements.object: opinions at Board meetings without any fear or favour and without any influence on exercise of his/her independent judgement

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) not interfere in the performance of their duties by the whole-time
directors and other officers of the Bank and wherever the director has reasons to believe otherwise, he/she shall forthwith disclose his/her concerns to the Board;
requirements.object: to the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) not make improper use of information disclosed to him/her as a
member of the Board for his/her or someone else's advantage or benefit and shall use the information disclosed to him/her by the Bank in his/her capacity as director of the Bank only for the purposes of performance of his/her duties as a director and not for any other purpose.
requirements.object: to him/her by the Bank in his/her capacity as director of the Bank only for the purposes of performance of his/her dutie

requirements.full_sentence: (i) the Bank shall apprise the director about:

(c) voting rights at Board meetings including matters in which Director
should not participate because of his/her interest, direct or indirect therein;
requirements.object: interest, direct or indirect therein

requirements.full_sentence: and appoint the compliance officer who shall be responsible for all statutory and legal compliance.
requirements.object: statutory and legal compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) the Bank shall disclose and provide to the Board including the director all
information which is reasonably required for them to carry out their functions
and duties as a directors of the Bank and to take informed decisions in
respect of matters brought before the Board for its consideration or entrusted
to the director by the Board or any committee thereof;
requirements.object: the Board including the director all information which is reasonably required for them to carry out their functions and duties

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) the disclosures to be made by the Bank to the directors shall include but not
be limited to the following:
requirements.object: limited to the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) the Bank shall communicate outcome of Board deliberations to directors
and concerned personnel and prepare and circulate minutes of the meeting
of Board to directors in a timely manner and to the extent possible within two
business days of the date of conclusion of the Board meeting;
requirements.object: deliberations to directors and concerned personnel and prepare and circulate minutes of the meeting of Board to directors

requirements.full_sentence:
The Bank shall provide to the director periodic reports on the functioning of internal
control system including effectiveness thereof.
requirements.object: periodic reports on the functioning of internal control system including effectiveness thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
The Bank shall appoint a compliance officer who shall be a Senior executive
reporting to the Board and be responsible for setting forth policies and procedures
and shall monitor adherence to the applicable laws and regulations and policies and
procedures including but not limited to directions of Reserve Bank of India and other
concerned statutory and governmental authorities.
requirements.object: who shall be a Senior executive reporting to the Board and be responsible for setting forth policies and procedures and s

requirements.full_sentence:
The director shall not assign, transfer, sublet or encumber his/her office and his/her
rights and obligations as director of the Bank to any third party provided that nothing
herein contained shall be construed to prohibit delegation of any authority, power,
function or delegation by the Board or any committee thereof subject to applicable
laws and regulations including Memorandum and Articles of Association of the
Bank.
requirements.object: encumber his/her office and his/her rights and obligations as director of the Bank to any third party provided that nothin

requirements.full_sentence:
The failure on the part of either party hereto to perform, discharge, observe or
comply with any obligation or duty shall not be deemed to be a waiver thereof nor
shall it operate as a bar to the performance, observance, discharge or compliance
thereof at any time or times thereafter.
requirements.object: a waiver thereof nor shall it operate as a bar to the performance, observance, discharge or compliance thereof at any time or times th

requirements.full_sentence:
Any and all amendments and/or supplements and/or alterations to this Deed of
Covenants shall be valid and effectual only if in writing and signed by the director
and the duly authorised representative of the Bank.
requirements.object: only if in writing and signed by the director and the duly authorised representative of the Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
This Deed of Covenants has been executed in duplicate and both the copies shall
be deemed to be originals.
requirements.object: originals

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) In case the bank proposes to give any sign-on/joining bonus (limited to the first year), which
should be in the form of share-linked instruments, its details (such as number of shares, grant date and price, monetary value, vesting schedule) should be furnished separately.
